themes.label: Kingdom
themes.summary: This chapter stresses reign, kingdom, throne, rule, or the authority of God and His Christ. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Cross references echo "Kingdom". Word-study detail reinforces "מֶ֣לֶךְ: king - a king".

themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "How does this covenant structure foreshadow Christ's redemption?". Cross references echo "Covenant".

evidenceTrail.detail: How does this covenant structure foreshadow Christ's redemption?

evidenceTrail.label: Verse 4 word study
evidenceTrail.detail: בְּרִיתִי֙: my covenant - a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh)

themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 1 verse. Cross references echo "Judgment".
